subtitle.ja: 人差し指の構えから始めます。右人差し指の糸を外します。右手から全ての糸を静かに外します
subtitle.en: Begin in "Opening A". Release the right index-finger string. Let all the strings fall away from the right hand.

subtitle.ja: 左人差し指の2本の糸を、右親指と小指で手前側から取ります
subtitle.en: With the right thumb and little finger, move over from the near side and pick down the two left–index-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左人差し指の輪に右人差し指を上から入れ、輪を右人差し指に移します
subtitle.en: Insert the right index finger from above into the left index loop and transfer the loop to the right index finger.

subtitle.ja: 右人差し指の輪に左人差し指を上から入れ、右手のひらの2本の糸を取って引き出します
subtitle.en: Insert the left index finger from above into the right index loop, move over and pick down the two right-palm strings, and draw them out.

subtitle.ja: 右親指と右小指の全ての糸を外します
subtitle.en: Release all strings from the right thumb and right little finger.

subtitle.ja: 右人差し指の糸を外します。左人差し指にかかっている2本の糸を右手で持ち、左人差し指から外して引き出します
subtitle.en: Release the right index-finger string. Take the two strings on the left index finger with the right hand, remove them from the finger, and draw them out.

subtitle.ja: 右手を離し、右手前の輪に右親指を、右向こうの輪に右小指を上から入れます。中央の2つの輪に右親指と小指をそれぞれ下から入れます
subtitle.en: Release the right hand. Insert the right thumb from above into the near right loop and the right little finger from above into the far right loop. Insert the right thumb and little finger from below into the two central loops.

subtitle.ja: 右親指と右小指の輪の間にある輪に、右人差し指を上から入れて左側の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: Insert the right index finger from above into the loop between the right thumb and right little finger, and pick down the left-side string.

subtitle.ja: 右親指と小指の前にある輪に細い棒を差し込みます。両手を強く引いて棒を固定します。右親指と小指の糸を外して完成です
subtitle.en: Insert a slender stick into the loops in front of the right thumb and little finger. Pull both hands firmly to secure the stick, then release the strings from the right thumb and little finger to show the finished figure.

subtitle.ja: 右手を引くと、棒が左に移動します
subtitle.en: When the right hand is pulled, the stick moves to the left.
